features.name: Harness Baseline
features.description: Keep the agent startup path, feature state, progress log, handoff, and verification script current for this repository.
features.evidence: Created AGENTS.md, feature_list.json, progress.md, session-handoff.md, and init.sh. ./init.sh passed on 2026-06-12: npm run build succeeded and npm test passed 1 file / 8 tests.

features.name: Responsive Map and Filter UX
features.description: Maintain non-overlapping desktop layout and mobile/PWA map controls for filters, map modes, and dashboard scroll behavior.
features.evidence: Recent work adjusted filter deck flow, map sizing, heatmap readability, nearby geolocation feedback, nearby clear behavior, and active-control accessibility. Playwright checks verified desktop/mobile no horizontal overflow and static control deck.

features.name: Dashboard Lazy Loading
features.description: Keep dashboard chart code split from the initial app bundle with a stable lightweight loading placeholder.
features.evidence: ./init.sh on 2026-06-12 emitted dist/assets/Dashboard--FgZ2qW_.js as a separate dashboard chunk; npm run build and npm test passed.

features.name: Accident Data Conversion Integrity
features.description: Protect the CSV-to-static-JSON conversion pipeline, coordinate validation, summaries, hotspots, and tests.

features.name: Release and Handoff Hygiene
features.description: Before release or handoff, record verification, deployment assumptions, risks, and next-session instructions.
features.evidence: Code review fixed service-worker update strategy and recorded verification in progress.md. Data conversion integrity remains not-started.
